allOf.description: The external workflow execution that the signal was delivered to.

The ID of the SignalExternalWorkflowExecutionInitiated event corresponding to the SignalExternalWorkflowExecution decision to request this signal. This information can be useful for diagnosing problems by tracing back the chain of events leading up to this event.

description: Provides the details of the ExternalWorkflowExecutionSignaled event.
title: ExternalWorkflowExecutionSignaledEventAttributes
